questionHtml: Calculate the absolute uncertainty in Fmax3 for Δp = 30 kPa. State an appropriate number of significant figures for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
15 % seen anywhere ✓

«Δ(F3) =» 39.4 × 105 × 0.15 = 5.9 × 105 ✓

±6 × 105 ✓


MP1 is for the propagation of 5 %. It can be shown differently, e.g. 3 × 5% Allow students to use 40 × 105 (from the graph).

Award MP3 for any uncertainty rounded to 1 significant digit

Award [3] for a BCA.

Allow ECF from MP1 and MP2

meta.title: Calculate the absolute uncertainty in Fmax3 for Δp = 30 kPa. State an appropriate number of significant figures for your answer.
